data.title: MtnDAO is launching an on-chain investment fund called “mtnCapital”
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MtnDAO is launching an on-chain investment fund called "mtnCapital", and its token MTN will become the flagship asset of mtnCapital. It is reported that mtnCapital is an experimental on-chain investment fund managed by a market-centric form of governance called futarchy. (Coindesk)

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 1,537 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 45,290 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the 10 Bitcoin ETFs in the United States had a net outflow of 1,537 BTC, of ​​which BlackRock had an outflow of 689 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 571,970 BTC, worth US$51.23 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 45,290 ETH, of which Grayscale ETHE had an outflow of 28,467 ETH. ETHE currently holds 1,240,288 ETH, worth US$2.72 billion.

data.title: Comedian TJ Miller Advocates For Bitcoin Awareness
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin, a decentralized digital currency, lacks an official spokesperson, yet it continues to gain mainstream attention through the support of well-known figures. Comedian and actor TJ Miller, recognized for his roles in 'Silicon Valley' and 'Deadpool,' has emerged as a vocal advocate for Bitcoin. In a recent episode of 'Decentralize with Cointelegraph,' Miller discussed his journey into the world of Bitcoin, emphasizing his belief in financial sovereignty and the potential connection between comedy and cryptocurrency.

Miller's interest in Bitcoin began during a casual coffee outing in Manhattan, coinciding with Bitcoin Investor Week. During this visit, Gareth Jenkinson of Cointelegraph encountered Miller at a café, leading to an impromptu discussion about Bitcoin. Miller's passion for Bitcoin extends beyond mere enthusiasm; he views it as the future of money and aims to leverage his platform to educate and inspire others about its significance. He expressed his desire to be a trusted figure in the Bitcoin community, helping to raise cultural awareness and understanding of Bitcoin's importance.

Miller joins a growing list of celebrities and public figures who have embraced Bitcoin, including athletes like Tom Brady, musicians such as Kanye West, and political figures like Senator Cynthia Lummis. While many focus on Bitcoin's financial benefits, Miller is particularly interested in shaping the cultural narrative around Bitcoin. He aims to help people grasp Bitcoin's philosophy, decentralization, and real-world impact. His approach, using humor as a tool to simplify complex topics, could significantly influence the perception of Bitcoin. As more high-profile advocates emerge, Bitcoin's cultural narrative is evolving from a niche financial experiment into a mainstream movement.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 600 USDT with a Narrowed 0.12% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2025, 14:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 600 USDT and is now trading at 599.809998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.12% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Robinhood EU announces launch of PENGU trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Robinhood EU announced the launch of PENGU, and users in the European market can now trade the token.

data.title: Microsoft Develops AI Model to Compete with OpenAI
data.description: According to Foresight News, Microsoft is reportedly working on an internal artificial intelligence reasoning model to rival OpenAI. The tech giant may also consider selling this model to developers, as reported by The Information.

data.title: LBank will launch OS U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank will launch the OS U-based perpetual contract at 23:00 (SGT) on March 7, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
